documents.name: provision_1.txt
documents.full_text: The free movement of personal data within the Union shall be neither restricted nor prohibited for reasons connected with the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The free movement of personal data within the Union shall be neither restricted nor prohibited for reasons connected with the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data.

documents.name: provision_10.txt
documents.full_text: Processing of personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences or related security measures based on Article 6(1) shall be carried out only under the control of official authority or when the processing is authorised by Union or Member State law providing for appropriate safeguards for the rights and freedoms of data subjects. Any comprehensive register of criminal convictions shall be kept only under the control of official authority.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Processing of personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences or related security measures based on Article 6(1)

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: shall be carried out only under the control of official authority or when the processing is authorised by Union or Member State law providing for appropriate safeguards for the rights and freedoms of data subjects.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Any comprehensive register of criminal convictions

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: shall be kept only under the control of official authority.

annotations.label: Residual
annotations.text: personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences or related security measures

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: processing is authorised by Union or Member State law providing for appropriate safeguards for the rights and freedoms of data subjects

documents.name: provision_11.txt
documents.full_text: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller, the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject

documents.name: provision_12.txt
documents.full_text: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21, the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject

documents.name: provision_13.txt
documents.full_text: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were collected, the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were collected,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were collected

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2

documents.name: provision_14.txt
documents.full_text:
The controller shall provide the information referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2:

within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month, having regard to the specific circumstances in which the personal data are processed;

if the personal data are to be used for communication with the data subject, at the latest at the time of the first communication to that data subject; or

if a disclosure to another recipient is envisaged, at the latest when the personal data are first disclosed.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The controller shall provide the information referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2:

annotations.label: Precondition

annotations.label: Precondition

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: if a disclosure to another recipient is envisaged, at the latest when the personal data are first disclosed.

annotations.text: personal data are to be used for communication with the data subject

documents.name: provision_15.txt
documents.full_text: The right to obtain a copy referred to in paragraph 3 shall not adversely affect the rights and freedoms of others.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The right to obtain a copy referred to in paragraph 3 shall not adversely affect the rights and freedoms of others.

documents.name: provision_16.txt
documents.full_text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller without undue delay the rectification of inaccurate personal data concerning him or her. Taking into account the purposes of the processing, the data subject shall have the right to have incomplete personal data completed, including by means of providing a supplementary statement.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller without undue delay the rectification of inaccurate personal data concerning him or her.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Taking into account the purposes of the processing,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the data subject shall have the right to have incomplete personal data completed, including by means of providing a supplementary statement.

documents.name: provision_17.txt
documents.full_text: Where the controller has made the personal data public and is obliged pursuant to paragraph 1 to erase the personal data, the controller, taking account of available technology and the cost of implementation, shall take reasonable steps, including technical measures, to inform controllers which are processing the personal data that the data subject has requested the erasure by such controllers of any links to, or copy or replication of, those personal data.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Where the controller has made the personal data public and is obliged pursuant to paragraph 1 to erase the personal data,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the controller, taking account of available technology and the cost of implementation, shall take reasonable steps, including technical measures, to inform controllers which are processing the personal data that the data subject has requested the erasure by such controllers of any links to, or copy or replication of, those personal data.

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: take reasonable steps, including technical measures, to inform controllers which are processing the personal data that the data subject has requested the erasure by such controllers of any links to, or copy or replication of, those personal data

annotations.label: Residual
annotations.text: links to, or copy or replication of, those personal data

documents.name: provision_18.txt
documents.full_text: A data subject who has obtained restriction of processing pursuant to paragraph 1 shall be informed by the controller before the restriction of processing is lifted.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: A data subject who has obtained restriction of processing pursuant to paragraph 1

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: shall be informed by the controller before the restriction of processing is lifted

annotations.label: Temporal
annotations.text: before the restriction of processing is lifted

documents.name: provision_19.txt
documents.full_text: The controller shall communicate any rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18 to each recipient to whom the personal data have been disclosed, unless this proves impossible or involves disproportionate effort. The controller shall inform the data subject about those recipients if the data subject requests it.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The controller shall communicate any rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18 to each recipient to whom the personal data have been disclosed,

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: unless this proves impossible or involves disproportionate effort.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The controller shall inform the data subject about those recipients

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: if the data subject requests it.

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18

documents.name: provision_2.txt
documents.full_text: This Regulation shall be without prejudice to the application of Directive 2000/31/EC, in particular of the liability rules of intermediary service providers in Articles 12 to 15 of that Directive.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: This Regulation shall be without prejudice to the application of Directive 2000/31/EC, in particular of the liability rules of intermediary service providers in Articles 12 to 15 of that Directive

annotations.label: Hierarchies
annotations.text: without prejudice to the application of Directive 2000/31/EC

documents.name: provision_20.txt
documents.full_text: In exercising his or her right to data portability pursuant to paragraph 1, the data subject shall have the right to have the personal data transmitted directly from one controller to another, where technically feasible.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: In exercising his or her right to data portability pursuant to paragraph 1,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the data subject shall have the right to have the personal data transmitted directly from one controller to another,

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: exercising his or her right to data portability

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: transmitted directly from one controller to another

documents.name: provision_21.txt
documents.full_text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: objects to processing for direct marketing purposes

documents.name: provision_22.txt
documents.full_text:
Paragraph 1 shall not apply if the decision:

is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;

is authorised by Union or Member State law to which the controller is subject and which also lays down suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests; or 

is based on the data subject’s explicit consent.

annotations.label: Precondition
Acts
annotations.text: authorised by Union or Member State law

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: lays down suitable measures to safeguard the data subject’s rights and freedoms and legitimate interests

annotations.label: Residual
annotations.text: rights and freedoms and legitimate interests

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: based on the data subject’s explicit consent

documents.name: provision_23.txt

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: any legislative measure referred to in paragraph 1

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: shall contain specific provisions at least, where relevant, as to:

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the purposes of the processing or categories of processing;

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the scope of the restrictions introduced;

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the safeguards to prevent abuse or unlawful access or transfer;

annotations.label: Postcondition

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the storage periods and the applicable safeguards taking into account the nature, scope and purposes of the processing or categories of processing;

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the risks to the rights and freedoms of data subjects;

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the right of data subjects to be informed about the restriction, unless that may be prejudicial to the purpose of the restriction.

annotations.label: Residual

documents.name: provision_24.txt
documents.full_text: Where proportionate in relation to processing activities, the measures referred to in paragraph 1 shall include the implementation of appropriate data protection policies by the controller.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: Where proportionate in relation to processing activities,

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the measures referred to in paragraph 1 shall include the implementation of appropriate data protection policies by the controller.

annotations.label: Residual
annotations.text: proportionate in relation to processing activities

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: implementation of appropriate data protection policies

documents.name: provision_25.txt
documents.full_text: An approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42 may be used as an element to demonstrate compliance with the requirements set out in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article.

annotations.label: Precondition
annotations.text: An approved certification mechanism pursuant to Article 42

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: may be used as an element to demonstrate compliance with the requirements set out in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article

documents.name: provision_26.txt
documents.full_text: The arrangement referred to in paragraph 1 shall duly reflect the respective roles and relationships of the joint controllers vis-à-vis the data subjects. The essence of the arrangement shall be made available to the data subject.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The arrangement referred to in paragraph 1 shall duly reflect the respective roles and relationships of the joint controllers vis-à-vis the data subjects.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: The essence of the arrangement shall be made available to the data subject.

documents.name: provision_27.txt
documents.full_text: Where Article 3(2) applies, the controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union.

annotations.label: Postcondition
annotations.text: the controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union

annotations.label: Acts
annotations.text: designate in writing a representative in the Union
